drumSynth.title: Drum Synthesis Studio
instSynth.title: Instrument Synthesis Studio
suggest.title: Pattern Suggestions
suggest.mixMatchDesc: Mix & Match — Pick each track from a different suggestion
tour.welcomeDesc: Freally is an AI-powered beat maker that generates full drum patterns, chord progressions, melodies, and basslines — all in your browser. Let's walk through how to use it!
tour.welcomeAction: Press Next to start the tour, or use arrow keys to navigate.
tour.chooseGenreDesc: Start by picking a genre. This sets the musical foundation — drum patterns, chord progressions, and melodies will all match your chosen style.
tour.chooseGenreAction: Click the dropdown to explore 50+ genres across Electronic, Hip-Hop, Rock, Jazz, and more.
tour.setMoodDesc: The mood modifier shapes how each genre sounds. "Dark" uses minor scales, "Energetic" boosts tempo and velocity, "Mystical" adds exotic scales — each mood transforms the generated music.
tour.setMoodAction: Try switching between Dark, Happy, Sad, Energetic, Mystical, and Exotic moods.
tour.setKeyScaleDesc: Choose the musical key and scale. The key sets the root note, while the scale (Major, Minor, Dorian…) controls which notes are used. All generated patterns stay perfectly in key.
tour.setKeyScaleAction: Select a root key (C, D, E…) and a scale type. These auto-sync with your genre and mood.
tour.adjustTempoDesc: Set the BPM (beats per minute) to control how fast your track plays. This auto-adjusts when you change genre, but you can always override it manually.
tour.adjustTempoAction: Drag the BPM number left/right, double-click to type a value, or press T to tap tempo.
tour.barsGridDesc: Control the length of your pattern (4 or 8 bars) and the grid resolution (1/4 to 1/32 notes). Higher resolution means more detailed patterns with finer note placement.
tour.barsGridAction: Click 4 or 8 to set bar count. Click 1/4, 1/8, 1/16, or 1/32 for grid detail.
tour.generateEverythingDesc: The magic button! Global Generate creates a full beat across all tracks at once — drums, chords, melody, and bass — all musically coherent and genre-appropriate.
tour.generateEverythingAction: Click "✨ GLOBAL GEN" or press G on your keyboard to generate all tracks.
tour.perTrackGenerateDesc: Generate Groove regenerates just the drums without touching other tracks. Each tab has its own generate button for independent track regeneration.
tour.perTrackGenerateAction: Click "✦ GENERATE GROOVE" to regenerate only the drum pattern.
tour.navigateTracksDesc: Switch between instrument tracks using tabs: Drums (step sequencer), Chords/Melody/Bass (piano rolls), Mixer (levels), Arrange (song structure), plus Drum Synth and Instrument Synth.
tour.navigateTracksAction: Click any tab or press keys 1-8 to switch quickly between tracks.
tour.exportTrackDesc: Save your beat as WAV (lossless), MP3 (compressed), or MIDI (for your DAW). You can export the full mix or individual stems for each instrument track.
tour.exportTrackAction: Click "💾 EXPORT" to open the export panel with format and stem options.
tour.fileExplorerDesc: Browse and load your own audio samples. Drag WAV/MP3 files onto drum slots to replace sounds, or load instrument samples for the synth engines.
tour.fileExplorerAction: Click the sidebar icon (top-left) to open the File Explorer. Drag samples onto tracks.
tour.playbackControlsDesc: Use the transport bar to play, stop, and navigate your track. The position indicator shows where you are, and the +/- buttons let you fine-tune tempo.
tour.playbackControlsAction: Press Space to play/stop. Use + / - for tempo adjustments.
tour.lightDarkThemeDesc: Switch between dark mode (easy on the eyes, studio feel) and light mode (high contrast, daytime use). Your preference is saved automatically.
tour.lightDarkThemeAction: Click the sun/moon icon to toggle between themes.
tour.collaborationDesc: Create or join a room to collaborate live with other producers via peer-to-peer. Share a link, chat, follow each other's tabs, and lock tracks to avoid conflicts.
tour.collaborationAction: Click the 👥 button to open Host Controls. Create a room and share the link!
tour.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Freally has extensive keyboard shortcuts for everything: playback (Space), generate (G), tab switching (1-8), undo (Ctrl+Z), and many more. Master them for a faster workflow.
tour.keyboardShortcutsAction: Click the ? button or press ? to see all keyboard shortcuts.
